Badger Grapple Red — v20.7 Walk Sprites Repaint

Repainted player_walk.png and npc_walk.png (48x96, 3x4 grid of 16x24
frames) with the same shading discipline as the battle sprites and area
art. NPCs now use a distinct blue shirt so they read as separate from
the player at a glance (previously same palette).

EXTRA CARE HERE: this project already had one real bug in this exact
category — a previous version's left/right walk frames were different
heights and not true mirrors of each other, causing a visible stretch/
pulse when walking sideways. To make sure that couldn't happen again by
construction rather than luck:
- LEFT is the only side drawn by hand. RIGHT is generated by mirroring
  LEFT with PIL — they cannot be inconsistent with each other because
  they're the same pixels, flipped.
- Verified programmatically before shipping: every frame within a
  direction row has the identical pixel height (confirmed 23/23/23 for
  down/left/right, 22/22/22 for up — zero variance).
- Verified left truly faces left and right truly faces right using the
  same skin-centroid pixel analysis that originally caught the old bug
  (left: -0.69 offset, right: +0.69 — exact opposites, confirming the
  mirror is genuine and not accidentally symmetric).

Verified in a live browser: walked all 4 directions, screenshotted
mid-step (not just at rest) to actually catch the walk cycle in motion,
zero console errors.

Cache: ?v=207. Proof: title/note reads "v20.7 Walk Sprites Repaint".
